name: @statewalker/site-builder-demo
description: Browser demo: webrun-site-builder + webrun-http-browser relay + webrun-files-mem, dynamic-imported per-request server endpoint

scripts.example: pnpm --filter @statewalker/webrun-http-browser run build && pnpm --filter @statewalker/webrun-site-builder run build && pnpm run start
